admin_screens.name: admin-008-categories
admin_screens.title: Event Categories ‹ Dateline Site A - TEC + Eventin — WordPress
admin_screens.body_excerpt:
Skip to main content
Skip to toolbar





		

		



		
				
		View Calendar

Event Categories


When using The Events Calendar, we recommend that you use a geographic timezone such as "America/Los_Angeles" and avoid using a UTC timezone offset such as “UTC+0”.Choosing a UTC timezone for your site or individual events may cause problems when importing events or with Daylight Saving Time. Read moreDismiss this notice.
	



	Start selling tickets to your Events

	
		Sell tickets, collect RSVPs, and manage attendees for free with Event Tickets.
	

	Install Event Tickets


Dismiss this notice.








	Search Event Categories:
	
		
		







	

Add New Event Category





	

	Name
	
	The name is how it appears on your site.


	Slug
	
	The “slug” is the URL-friendly version of the name. It is usually all lowercase and contains only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

	
	Parent Event Category
		
	None
	Music
	Tech
	Workshops

				Assign a parent term to create a hierarchy. The term Jazz, for example, would be the parent of Bebop and Big Band.
	
	
	Description
	
	The description is not prominent by default; however, some themes may show it.


		
				
	
	











	

				
			Select bulk action
Bulk actions
	Delete


		
			3 items
«
‹
Current Page of 1
›
»

		Table ordered hierarchically. Ascending.	
	
		
			Select AllNameDescription Sort ascending.Slug Sort ascending.Count Sort ascending.

admin_screens.body_excerpt:
Skip to main content
Skip to toolbar





		

		



		
		View Calendar
	Events ImportWhen using The Events Calendar, we recommend that you use a geographic timezone such as "America/Los_Angeles" and avoid using a UTC timezone offset such as “UTC+0”.Choosing a UTC timezone for your site or individual events may cause problems when importing events or with Daylight Saving Time. Read moreDismiss this notice.
	



	Start selling tickets to your Events

	
		Sell tickets, collect RSVPs, and manage attendees for free with Event Tickets.
	

	Install Event Tickets


Dismiss this notice.

					New Import
					
	
	

	


	Event Aggregator will try to fetch 300 events starting from the current date or the specified date; you can modify this setting here. 

	Need assistance? You can find more information here:
	
	
		Importing Calendar Data From a CSV File	

	
	
		CSV File Formatting and Examples 	

    Event Aggregator will try to fetch events starting within the next one month from the current date or the specified date; you can modify this setting here. 

	

				
			
				Import Origin:
			
			
									
						
													CSV File

admin_screens.name: admin-032-troubleshooting
admin_screens.title: Troubleshooting ‹ Dateline Site A - TEC + Eventin — WordPress
admin_screens.body_excerpt:
Skip to main content
Skip to toolbar





		

		



		
		When using The Events Calendar, we recommend that you use a geographic timezone such as "America/Los_Angeles" and avoid using a UTC timezone offset such as “UTC+0”.Choosing a UTC timezone for your site or individual events may cause problems when importing events or with Daylight Saving Time. Read moreDismiss this notice.
	



	Start selling tickets to your Events

	
		Sell tickets, collect RSVPs, and manage attendees for free with Event Tickets.
	

	Install Event Tickets


Dismiss this notice.
	
		Hey there... did you check out the Help page?	


		
		
		Troubleshooting
		Sometimes things just don’t work as expected. We’ve created a wealth of resources to get you back on track.
	



	
	
		
			We’ve detected the following issues		
	

						
			
				
				
					
					
						Site time zone uses UTC					
				
			
			
				
					When using The Events Calendar, we highly recommend that you use a geographic timezone such as "America/Los_Angeles" and avoid using a UTC timezone offset such as “UTC+9”. Choosing a UTC timezone for your site or individual events may cause problems when importing events or with Daylight Saving Time. Go to your the General WordPress settings to adjust your site timezone.				
				
					
						Learn more					
					
						Adjust your timezone					
				
			
		
							
			
				
				
					
					
						Default Google Maps API key					
				
			
			
				
					The Events Calendar comes with an API key fo
